analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,791 as of Apr 25 06:17 EDT. Apr 24 intraday high $78,126. Monthly gain +13% (best month in 1yr). Key resistance $78.5K-$80.7K (rejected twice). Support $77,005 / $75,831.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 — mild fear zone; market posture defensive consolidation
BTC dominance 60.14% — capital rotating into BTC as defensive crypto asset vs altcoin weakness
Strategy bought 34,164 BTC for $2.54B (Apr week) — largest institutional buy since 2024
Goldman Sachs filed SEC registration for new Bitcoin ETF — institutional pipeline building
KelpDAO $292M exploit — DeFi TVL -$14B to 1yr low; altcoins -2-3%; BTC isolated from DeFi risk
Short squeeze pressure supporting price but trend unconfirmed (RSI neutral ~62)
Volume $107B/day — 15-20% below Mar-Apr avg; compression pattern, expansion expected in 3-5 sessions
FOMC Apr 28-29 — pre-event vol suppression; Fed Warsh stressed independence from Trump rate-cut demands
Iran ceasefire extended by Trump — geopolitical tail risk temporarily reduced
No major US macro data releases in next 24h; GDP Q1 + PCE due Apr 30
analysis.macro_backdrop: No CPI/PPI/NFP in next 24h. FOMC Apr 28-29 is the dominant near-term risk — rate hold expected at 3.50-3.75% but hawkish tone risk. GDP Q1 advance + Core PCE due Apr 30 (4 days). Iran ceasefire extended — oil prices off highs, risk assets stabilizing. Goldman Sachs BTC ETF filing is new bullish structural catalyst.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.45): BTC holding $77K-$78K with mixed signals — institutional buying (Strategy $2.54B) and ETF inflows are bullish, but Fear & Greed at 46 (fear), below-average volume, short squeeze without confirmed trend, and 2-day FOMC countdown all suppress directional conviction. Confidence 0.45 — below 0.50 threshold so macro filter is INACTIVE (bot trades on own technical signals). No clear catalyst to break $78.5K resistance in next 24h.
